productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girl Striped Pink Top
description: Composition Pink and white top made of 100% cotton, has a collar, short sleeves, buttoned chest placket, pin tucks on either sides of the placket and branding on the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Let your little princess enjoy her play time in style with this stylish top from doodle. The straps with buttons and bow adds an element of cuteness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with shorts or a skirt and sandals to complete her look.
